text.p: I have carefull the ativitie of your council for the past three year. the invitable conclusion is that your council has woefull failed the people.

a local government council is supposed to augument at the grassroot level the activities of the State Government. in this respect your council is expected to provide essntial road for over three year not a single road has been maintained, let alone construct a new one. as a resuit of this neglect all the council road in my town are now unpassble. you will agree with me that this is a situation which all enlightened and patriotic citizens must condemn. It is in the interest of the people even if you do not road evreyone that you immediatelly start to repair all council road. this will go a long way to satisfy the interest of the people even if you do not
